reviews.comment:
Me atendieron rapido, muy limpio los baños buena atencion estaba de pasada

(Translated by Google)
I was served quickly, the bathrooms were very clean, and the service was good; I was just passing through.

reviews.comment:
Buena la atención, pero tienen pocos surtidores habilitados (sea para nafta o gasoil) y un playero solo...

A veces te tienes que esperar casi media hora de filas para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but they have few pumps (for either gasoline or diesel) and only one parking lot...

Sometimes you have to wait in lines for almost half an hour to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNFlDWF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gente muy amable su personal, higiene.Muy lindo lugar,combina estación de servicio y un pequeño lugar donde tomar y comer algo sencillo

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly staff, cleanliness. Very nice place, it combines a gas station and a small place to have a drink and a simple meal.

reviews.comment:
Les quedó pequeña la estación de servicio, creció el turismo y en semana santa de ven esas circunstancias...ojala q puedan ampliarla...excelente servicio de sus empleados!

(Translated by Google)
Their gas station has become too small, tourism has grown, and these circumstances are especially noticeable during Holy Week... I hope they can expand it... excellent service from their employees!
